violations.text: Thermometer is lacking in the 2-door reach-in. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the 2-door reach-in observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2024

The dishwasher is lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food or food equipment is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Gasket of the 2-door reach-in was observed in poor repair. Gasket is pulling away from the door. In addition, the door handle of the 2-door reach-in observed with duct tape. Duct tape is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Gasket and door handle must be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2023
